author: doll-agent
content: Implemented complex round-trip via Arrow's FixedSizeList<Float, 2> convention (the canonical numerical-data representation, used by Arrow's geospatial/vector extensions and pandas). Gated on the new 'complex' cargo feature. Functions: complex64_to_arrow / arrow_to_complex64 (Complex<f64> ↔ FixedSizeList<Float64, 2>), complex32_to_arrow / arrow_to_complex32 (Complex<f32> variant). Each complex value emits two child floats (real, imag); read-back rejects non-FSL inputs and FSLs with length != 2 via InvalidDtype. 3 unit tests cover f64/f32 round-trip and the rejection path. Numpy-crate-side complex (via numpy/complex feature) is not wired here — tracked as a follow-up since it requires a Complex<T>-aware NpElement impl. Tracks #552.
